title: Semarina
description: A well-researched client-side modpack optimized for the best Vanilla+ experience on RP and adventure servers.
body:
[Join Discord for support or suggestions!](https://discord.gg/DKBv8QJ7U4) This is a client-side modpack. ____ ## About This Mdopack This Vanilla+ modpack is crafted to enhance the role-playing potential of Minecraft while preserving the authentic Vanilla Minecraft feel. Designed with multiplayer adventures in mind, it provides essential tools to transform your server into a truly immersive RP world. We've carefully curated the best mods to enhance performance, immersion, and quality of life, ensuring a seamless experience. At Semarina, we strive to integrate mods and configurations that align with the mechanics of most roleplay and adventure-focused servers, providing a balanced and optimized multiplayer experience. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes, engaging in rich storytelling, or simply looking for a smoother gameplay experience, this modpack has everything you need! ### Key Features ✅ **Role-Playing Focus** – Our primary goal is to expand Minecraft’s RP potential, offering tools and tweaks that bring characters, storytelling, and world-building to life. ✅ **Vanilla+ Experience** – Adds new features and improves existing ones, all while maintaining the familiar Vanilla feel. ✅ **Multiplayer-Optimized** – Since RP is best enjoyed with others, this client-side modpack ensures seamless compatibility across different servers. ✅ **Performance & Optimization** – Carefully curated mods provide an optimized experience without unnecessary bloat, ensuring smooth gameplay. ____ ## Incompatibility - [Fresh Moves]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)) ____
Versioning The versioning format is `x.y.(z)`, where: - "x" is a mod list revision (addition/removal of a mod), - "y" is the config revision (incremented every time a config tweak is added or changed), - "z" is incremented when there's a version with only mod updates and little to no changes otherwise. We update this modpack for the latest version of Minecraft; therefore, we are unable to maintain updates for older versions. #### Derivative packs You can use the configuration files from SMC in your modpack as long as you make it clear in your modpack's description that you have (a note at the end is enough), preferrably with a link back to this page.
